entry.title: The Softness of Silicon Valley
entry.summary: I thought getting in was the hard part. It wasn't. The hard part was learning how to exist in a world where no one tells you if you're enough.

High standards. Constant pressure.
A place where you either perform or you\u2019re out.`),mdx("p",null,"I was ready for that version of the world."),mdx("p",null,`What I wasn\u2019t ready for\u2026
was how soft it felt.`),mdx("h2",null,"Politeness as a System"),mdx("p",null,"No one tells you you\u2019re wrong here."),mdx("p",null,"They say things like:"),mdx("ul",null,mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"\u201CThat\u2019s an interesting approach.\u201D"),mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"\u201CLet\u2019s explore that a bit more.\u201D"),mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"\u201CI wonder if there\u2019s another angle.\u201D")),mdx("p",null,`In Taiwan, feedback had edges.
You knew when you did poorly.`),mdx("p",null,"Here, everything was rounded."),mdx("p",null,`At first, it felt kind. Then it became confusing.
Then, slowly, it became exhausting.`),mdx("p",null,`Because if no one tells you you're wrong\u2014
no one tells you you're right either.`),mdx("h2",null,"The Missing Signal"),mdx("p",null,"I didn\u2019t realize how much I depended on clear signals."),mdx("p",null,`Grades. Rankings. Results.
Even failure had structure.`),mdx("p",null,`But here, feedback was abstract. Performance was implied.
You were expected to `,mdx("em",{parentName:"p"},"just know"),"."),mdx("p",null,"And I didn\u2019t."),mdx("p",null,"So I started filling in the gaps myself."),mdx("ul",null,mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"If no one praised it, maybe it wasn\u2019t good"),mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"If feedback was vague, maybe I missed something"),mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"If I wasn\u2019t sure, I assumed the worst")),mdx("p",null,"It wasn\u2019t rational."),mdx("p",null,"But it was familiar."),mdx("h2",null,"A Different Kind of Hunger"),mdx("p",null,"Looking back, I wasn\u2019t just trying to do good work."),mdx("p",null,"I was trying to feel ",mdx("em",{parentName:"p"},"recognized"),"."),mdx("p",null,`Not in a loud, obvious way\u2014
but in the quiet, human way:`),mdx("p",null,`Someone noticing.
Someone saying, \u201Cthis is good.\u201D
Someone making it clear that I belonged.`),mdx("p",null,"I didn\u2019t have the language for it at the time."),mdx("p",null,"So I translated it into effort."),mdx("p",null,`Work harder. Stay later. Fix more things.
Be useful enough that no one questions you.`),mdx("p",null,"It worked\u2014on the surface."),mdx("p",null,"But underneath, nothing was being resolved."),mdx("h2",null,"Luck, Misunderstood"),mdx("p",null,"If you looked at my life from the outside, it was simple:"),mdx("p",null,"A kid from Taiwan makes it to Silicon Valley."),mdx("p",null,"Lucky."),mdx("p",null,"That word came up a lot."),mdx("p",null,"And I didn\u2019t disagree."),mdx("p",null,"But luck hides the more uncomfortable truth:"),mdx("p",null,"Getting in doesn\u2019t mean you\u2019re ready."),mdx("p",null,"It just means you\u2019re allowed in the room."),mdx("p",null,`What you bring with you\u2014your habits, your fears, your ways of making sense of the world\u2014
those don\u2019t upgrade automatically.`),mdx("p",null,"They just get\u2026 exposed."),mdx("h2",null,"Learning What Was Never Taught"),mdx("p",null,"The hardest part wasn\u2019t the work."),mdx("p",null,"It was learning things that weren\u2019t written anywhere:"),mdx("ul",null,mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"How to read between the lines"),mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"How to ask for feedback without feeling like you're failing"),mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"How to separate your work from your worth"),mdx("li",{parentName:"ul"},"How to accept that \u201Cno negative feedback\u201D might actually mean \u201Cyou\u2019re doing fine\u201D")),mdx("p",null,"These weren\u2019t technical problems."),mdx("p",null,"They were human ones."),mdx("p",null,"And I was underprepared."),mdx("h2",null,"The Quiet Realization"),mdx("p",null,"At some point, I started noticing a pattern."),mdx("p",null,"The people who did well weren\u2019t always the smartest."),mdx("p",null,"They were the ones who seemed\u2026 at ease."),mdx("p",null,`They could take feedback without shrinking.
They could speak without over-calculating.
They didn\u2019t need constant confirmation to keep going.`),mdx("p",null,"It wasn\u2019t confidence in the loud sense."),mdx("p",null,"It was something steadier."),mdx("p",null,"Something internal."),mdx("h2",null,"What This Chapter Really Was"),mdx("p",null,"I thought I came here to become a better engineer."),mdx("p",null,"And I did."),mdx("p",null,"But that wasn\u2019t the real work."),mdx("p",null,"The real work was more uncomfortable than that:"),mdx("p",null,`Learning that competence doesn\u2019t automatically create security.
Learning that achievement doesn\u2019t automatically create belonging.`),mdx("p",null,"And slowly, painfully\u2014"),mdx("p",null,`Learning that the thing I was chasing in work
was never just about work.`),mdx("hr",null),mdx("p",null,"I was more fortunate than I understood."),mdx("p",null,`Not just because I made it here\u2014
but because this place revealed something I had been able to avoid seeing for a long time.`),mdx("p",null,"A need I didn\u2019t know how to name."),mdx("p",null,`A version of myself
that needed more than success to feel whole.`),mdx("p",null,"The next chapter is where that realization starts to change how I live."))}MDXContent.isMDXComponent=!0;
